mapper.sql: id, recipe_id, author_id, version_no, title, cover_media_id, intro, difficulty, cook_time, serving, ingredients_json, steps_json, tips_json, video_json, status, reject_reason, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at

v.id, v.recipe_id, v.author_id, v.version_no, v.title, v.cover_media_id, v.intro, v.difficulty, v.cook_time, v.serving, v.ingredients_json, v.steps_json, v.tips_json, v.video_json, v.status, v.reject_reason, v.created_at, v.updated_at, v.deleted_at
mapper.select: select from cook_recipe_versions where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
select from cook_recipe_versions where recipe_id = #{recipeId} and deleted_at is null order by version_no desc limit 1
select from cook_recipe_versions where recipe_id = #{recipeId} and deleted_at is null order by version_no desc limit 1 for update
select from cook_recipe_versions v inner join cook_recipes r on r.current_version_id = v.id where r.id = #{recipeId} and r.deleted_at is null and v.deleted_at is null limit 1
select from cook_recipe_versions where recipe_id = #{recipeId} and status = 'pending_review' and deleted_at is null order by version_no desc limit 1
select max(version_no) from cook_recipe_versions where recipe_id = #{recipeId} and deleted_at is null
mapper.update: update cook_recipe_versions set title = #{title}, cover_media_id = #{coverMediaId}, intro = #{intro}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, cook_time = #{cookTime}, serving = #{serving}, ingredients_json = #{ingredientsJson}, steps_json = #{stepsJson}, tips_json = #{tipsJson}, video_json = #{videoJson}, status = #{status}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
update cook_recipe_versions set status = #{status}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
update cook_recipe_versions set status = #{status}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
update cook_recipe_versions set video_json = #{videoJson}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
